name: Coconut Macaroon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, beat the butter until creamy.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
4. With the mixer on "cream," add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add almond extract.
6. Turn the mixture into a greased 10-inch tube pan or bundt pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 325°F.
8. Cool for 30 minutes before removing from the pan. This cake can be frozen.
